title: Code for bulk and single-nucleus analysis of Anopheles gambiae fat body
author: McNinch, Colton
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This repository contains code for bulk and single-nucleus RNA-seq analysis of the  Anopheles gambiae  fat body. It includes scripts for data processing, analysis, and visualization of cell-specific responses to blood feeding and infection. The code supports the results presented in “Cell-specific responses of  Anopheles gambiae  fat body to blood feeding and infection at single-nucleus resolution.”  - doi: 10.1101/2025.07.29.667437
steps_raw: This repository contains code for bulk and single-nucleus RNA-seq analysis of the  Anopheles gambiae  fat body. It includes scripts for data processing, analysis, and visualization of cell-specific responses to blood feeding and infection. The code supports the results presented in “Cell-specific responses of  Anopheles gambiae  fat body to blood feeding and infection at single-nucleus resolution.”  - doi: 10.1101/2025.07.29.667437
